title: Individual Counseling * Veterans - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Individual Counseling * Veterans 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON CHANGE CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH THERAPY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific evidence-based individual mental health counseling with a focus on African American and veteran community members. 1312 SW Washington Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-3pm Email (503) 719-7985 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS FIND VA LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on VA locations, including VA health, emergency care, VA benefits, and Vet Centers (which offer individual and group counseling). Also provides locations for in-network community care providers, pharmacies, and urgent care for same-day care for minor illnesses or injuries. Locator also includes National Cemeteries. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (866) 620-2071 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides counseling sessions with a therapist from the Vet Center, an Idaho-based Veterans Affairs program which visits the location regularly. 180 W Idaho Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Veterans; does not require receipt of VA benefits Hours: Every other Friday Email (541) 889-1978 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON CHANGE CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH THERAPY VETERAN ADVOCATES OF ORE-IDA COUNSELING SERVICES
